# ANALYSIS: REAL-FILLS_VALIDATION_TOP3_J_DAYS

**Filed:** 2026-09-16  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** validation_gate  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

We hypothesize that the engine's behavior on the top 3 J days (4/29, 5/01, 5/04) when evaluated with a realistic OPRA simulator (including bid/ask spread, slippage, and realistic fill model) will produce P&L within ±20% of the baseline engine P&L recorded in the source-of-truth J days.

## Mechanism

Run the current production engine (heartbeat.md + params.json) through a realistic OPRA simulator for each of the three J days, using cached OPRA quote files and a slippage model that respects the NBBO. Compare the simulator's net P&L for each day to the source-of-truth J day P&L (+$342, +$470, +$730). Compute percentage difference; if all three days are within ±20%, the validation passes.

| 5/04 winner | +$730 | unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest | unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest |

| 5/07 loser 1 | -$45 | unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest | unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest |
| 5/07 loser 2 | -$120 | unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest | unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest |

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline (as per OP-20).
2. **Sample bias:** Sample size = 3 J winner days + 4 J loser days = 7 days; selection method = source-of-truth J days (immutable); overfit risk = low because days are fixed and not part of optimization.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (this validation is in-sample on J days; OOS not applicable).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (validation pending realistic OPRA simulator run).
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: if simulator shows >20% deviation on any J day, validation fails; max drawdown scenario: simulator could turn winners into losers; blow-up scenario: simulator could cause large losses on loser days due to slippage.
6. **Concentration:** Top-5 days = (sum of top 3 J winners) / total J P&L? For J days only, top 3 winners constitute 100% of J winner P&L; concentration disclosure: top-3 J days = 100% of J winner P&L.

## Pre-merge gate

Realistic OPRA simulator validation on top 3 J days must pass (±20% tolerance). Gym validators must pass (编者注: existing heartbeat.md tests). No walk‑forward required for this validation.

## Confidence

3 / 10 -- We have not yet run the realistic OPRA simulator; results unknown.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This analysis does not conflict with any existing candidate; it is a validation gate that must be satisfied before any candidate can be ratified. It complements all candidates by ensuring real-fills fidelity.
